data.body: DUPLICATE of c681-b7c5-d44d-495b (same title, CLOSED). The work landed on main as commit 1f3a61c4c 'docs(brainstorm-skill): read plan-review gate docs before recording tickets' (rebar-ticket: c681-b7c5-d44d-495b, Change-Id I350f3154266b580c6d444044add1e26886a49b21, Signed-off-by Joe Oakhart; reachable from HEAD). The required content is present at examples/agent-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md:124-137 ('### Before recording tickets, read the project's plan-review gate') — instructs the brainstorm agent to read docs/plan-review-gate.md + docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md, author each ticket to the gate's blocking criteria + overlays, and run 'rebar review-plan' + remediate before claiming. All ACs are satisfied by that landed change; this ticket is superseded/duplicate. Closing.
